blocks.text: Dongguan Xinyuan Printing Factory – FSC® & ISO 9001 Certified Packaging Manufacturer in China

Dongguan Xinyuan Printing Co., Ltd. is Jinhao Xinyuan Group’s high-capacity packaging production center in Dongguan, Guangdong Province, China.Specializing in premium printed cartons, rigid boxes, and instruction manuals, the factory supports export production for international brands in electronics, cosmetics, home appliances, and FMCG sectors.Certified under FSC®, ISO 9001:2015, and SMETA, the facility combines cutting-edge technology, sustainability, and precision printing for global quality assurance.
About Dongguan Xinyuan Printing Co., Ltd.

Located in the heart of China’s manufacturing hub, Dongguan Xinyuan Printing Co., Ltd. covers over 30,000 m² and employs more than 400 trained technicians.This facility integrates pre-press, offset printing, surface finishing, die-cutting, lamination, folding, and assembly, ensuring full control from artwork to delivery.
Its proximity to Shenzhen and Guangzhou ports guarantees rapid logistics and export convenience for clients across Asia, Europe, and North America.
PRODUCTION CAPABILITIES

The Dongguan site is equipped with world-class machinery enabling mass production with fine printing accuracy and color consistency.Every process runs under ISO 9001:2015 quality management and FSC® chain-of-custody systems.
Key Production Lines:
• Offset Printing: Heidelberg CX102 / XL105 6-color presses with inline coating
Offset Printing: Heidelberg CX102 / XL105 6-color presses with inline coating
• Die-Cutting: Bobst & MK automatic precision lines
Die-Cutting: Bobst & MK automatic precision lines
• Folding & Gluing: Vega & Jagenberg high-speed folder-gluers
Folding & Gluing: Vega & Jagenberg high-speed folder-gluers
• Hot Stamping & UV Coating: KURZ and Sakurai systems for luxury finishes
Hot Stamping & UV Coating: KURZ and Sakurai systems for luxury finishes
• Rigid Box Assembly: Semi-automatic line for magnetic and collapsible boxes
Rigid Box Assembly: Semi-automatic line for magnetic and collapsible boxes
• Quality Control: GMI color proofing, ISTA transit testing, and barcode traceability
Quality Control: GMI color proofing, ISTA transit testing, and barcode traceability

blocks.text: Certified to Global Standards
Dongguan Xinyuan Printing Co., Ltd. operates under globally recognized standards for quality, sustainability, and ethical manufacturing.
Certifications:
• FSC® Chain-of-Custody Certification – Verifies responsible paper sourcing.
FSC® Chain-of-Custody Certification – Verifies responsible paper sourcing.
• ISO 9001:2015 – Quality management system ensuring process consistency.
ISO 9001:2015 – Quality management system ensuring process consistency.
• SMETA (Sedex) – Ethical trade and social compliance for export customers.
SMETA (Sedex) – Ethical trade and social compliance for export customers.
• G7® Certification – International color calibration standard guaranteeing print accuracy.
G7® Certification – International color calibration standard guaranteeing print accuracy.

SUSTAINABILITY & SOCIAL RESPONSIBILITY
Sustainability is at the core of Dongguan Xinyuan’s daily operations.The factory minimizes waste, optimizes energy use, and ensures worker welfare through internationally recognized audit programs.
• 100% FSC® certified paper and recyclable packaging materials
100% FSC® certified paper and recyclable packaging materials
• Water-based, soy-based inks and low-VOC coatings
Water-based, soy-based inks and low-VOC coatings
• Closed-loop recycling of paper waste and offcuts
Closed-loop recycling of paper waste and offcuts
• Solar power supplementation and efficient LED curing systems
Solar power supplementation and efficient LED curing systems
• Compliant with SMETA and local labor regulations
Compliant with SMETA and local labor regulations
By integrating environmental responsibility with manufacturing precision, Dongguan Xinyuan supports global brands in achieving their sustainability targets.
Jinhao Xinyuan Group – Integrated Asian Supply Chain

Dongguan Xinyuan Printing Co., Ltd. works in coordination with the group's facility in Bac Giang (Vietnam). Together they form a regional network offering consistent quality, shared standards, and scalable production for international packaging programs.
This cross-border manufacturing framework enables faster delivery, balanced capacity, and uniform quality for multinational brands.
